Tennis Automated | ATP Fantasy Archive

Published Cheat Sheets

Versioned weekly ATP Fantasy pages live here. Squarespace should always load the current page from the latest manifest, but every published edition remains available in the archive.

Archive

Week 4 | Week 4 Draw Update
Week 4 Cheat Sheet

Draw update ATP Fantasy read for Week 4 centered on Madrid, shifting the focus from pre-draw theory to bracket shape, Bonus Ball leverage, core plays, value targets, and trap sections after the official draw.

Week 4 Cheat Sheet

Pre-draw ATP Fantasy read for Week 4 centered on Madrid, with refreshed elite anchors, Bonus Ball rankings, and value-versus-trap framing ahead of the official draw.

Pre-draw ATP Fantasy read for Madrid with updated Monte-Carlo carryover, current Barcelona and Munich signals, and refreshed Bonus Ball rankings before the official draw.
